title: magnolia sprengeri var. elongata
intro: Magnolia sprengeri var. elongata, also known as the 'Yellow Crown', is a specific variety of the Magnolia sprengeri plant, a type of flowering evergreen tree native to China. Its bark and leaves have been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in China, for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's medicinal properties are believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared into teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in dried or fresh forms in various herbal preparations.
